scriptDialog.title: Generate script with AI
scriptDialog.promptPlaceholder: e.g. "Read last 7 days of IIS logs and filter for 5xx status"
scriptDialog.replaceAll: Replace entire script (instead of inserting at cursor)
scriptDialog.disabled: AI features are disabled. Enable them via Llm:Enabled=true in the backend config.
scriptDialog.reviewWarning: Read AI output before saving. Malicious instructions may be injected via upstream data.

workflowDialog.title: Generate workflow with AI
workflowDialog.promptPlaceholder: e.g. "Run a PowerShell daily at 6 AM, send the result via email, notify operations channel on failure."
workflowDialog.validationFailed: AI response did not match the schema. Try a different description.
workflowDialog.retriedNonJson: First LLM response wasn't parseable JSON — a retry succeeded.

chat.title: AI workflow assistant
chat.buttonTitle: Explain or modify this workflow with AI
chat.placeholder: Ask about the workflow or describe a change…
chat.enterHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
chat.intro: Ask questions about the current workflow or describe a change. You can review proposals before applying them.
chat.lockRequiredToApply: Put the workflow into edit mode to apply changes.
chat.staleProposal: The workflow changed since this proposal — please regenerate.
chat.proposalExpired: Proposal no longer applicable after reload — please ask again.
chat.refineHint: Use this proposal as the base and adjust further
chat.scopeSelectionHint: Scope the question to the selected nodes

knowledge.title: AI Chat
knowledge.subtitle: Ask NodePilot — docs, workflows, operations, source code
knowledge.inputPlaceholder: Ask about NodePilot, your workflows, or the source code…
knowledge.emptyHint: Docs, your installed workflows and their runs, or the source code — read-only, so nothing changes.
knowledge.disabledBody: An administrator can enable it in Settings under "AI Knowledge (Chat)" (requires Llm:Enabled).
examples: How do I set up a webhook trigger?
Which workflows failed in the last 24 hours?
What does the 'Nightly Backup' workflow do and which machines does it use?
How do I set up email alerts for failed runs?
Which workflows run on a schedule?
How do I retry a failed run?
How does the system-configuration backup work?
